basics.name: Huanmi Tan
basics.summary: Solid background in software engineering. NLP enthusiast.

Professional Experience.name: ByteDance Inc.
Professional Experience.position: VolcTrans, NLP, AI Lab, Shanghai, China
highlights: Developed a full-stack web application from scratch for quality assessment of translation engines. Integrated BLEU and deployed COMET model to automate the evaluation the quality of translation engines with multiple metrics.
Analyzed previous data from event trackings to drive feature optimization. Modified and validated new behavior tracking points for future enhancements.
Contributed to the caring bot, Douyin Xiao'an. Generated Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT) data, reviewed SFT data and prompts in daily scrum meetings.

Professional Experience.name: Shanghai AI Laboratory
Professional Experience.position: AI for Imaging Group, Shanghai, China
highlights: Improved neural network robustness on memristors using Bayes optimization technique. Conducted experiments to pinpoint key determinants for model resilience.
Designed and coded an algorithm to automatically adjust dropout rates in sync with each Bayes optimization iteration, countering the challenge of memristor weight drifting.

Benchmarked and validated the algorithm across 10 network architectures under varying Gaussian noise levels to simulate memristor weight drifting. outperforming four baselines in terms of efficiency and accuracy across an extensive range of sigma values.

education.institution: Carnegie Mellon University, School of Computer Science
